headline: Business Analyst, AI and Data Storyteller
summary: I build decision-ready data products: advanced dashboards, predictive models, and automation that move ideas from raw data to executive-ready insights.

highlights: Conduct in-depth market and business research to inform long-term growth and competitive positioning
Identify operational inefficiencies and improve financial management processes for sustainable client performance
Support leadership teams through digital transformation, governance improvement, and risk management
Translate people, process, and performance analysis into actionable roadmaps with measurable impact

experience.role: Facilitator, AI Enthusiast and Data Scientist
highlights: Delivered practical training in data analysis and visualization
Supported research from field collection through interpretation
Converted advanced analytics concepts into actionable learning material
Executed data cleaning, statistical analysis, and visualization tasks
Contributed trend interpretation for policy and institutional reports
